affordability: MUST be exactly one of these uppercase values: HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW, VERY LOW, NOT SURE. Determine by applying the AFFORDABILITY LABEL RULES to your NMPC calculation. Do NOT default to NOT SURE if you can estimate NMPC from payment data.
reason_for_affordability: string (max 5 lines). Show your NMPC calculation and which threshold it falls into.
willingness: MUST be exactly one of these uppercase values: HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW, VERY LOW, NOT SURE. Determine from behavioral signals. Only use NOT SURE when there is genuinely zero interaction data.
reason_for_willingness: string (max 5 lines). Cite specific behavioral evidence.
arrears_clearance_plan: object or null. Only populate when Clear Arrears Plan is the recommended treatment. Contains: monthly_payment_recommended (number), surplus_above_mad (number), total_arrears (number), months_to_clear (number), projected_timeline (array of {month: number, payment: number, remaining_arrears: number}). If recommended treatment is NOT Clear Arrears Plan, set to null.
